zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Nelson於1146年5月22日出生在英國藍卡爾道爾頓時，她的父親Mr A Nelson26歲，母親Mrs Mis Nelson26歲。她於1187年之前與Richard FitzRobert de Lathom在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1201年4月23日在英國越可爾享年54歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.Ormskirk, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Nelson于1146年5月22日出生在英国藍卡爾道爾頓时，她的父亲Mr A Nelson26岁，母亲Mrs Mis Nelson26岁。她于1187年之前与Richard FitzRobert de Lathom在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1201年4月23日在英国越可爾享年54岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Nelson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the personal name Nell or Nele, either of which might be a pet form of Elias or less commonly of Niel (from Latin Nigellus). See also Neal .
Americanized form of Swedish   Nilsson   and also of the Danish, Norwegian, and North German cognates   Nielsen   and   Nilsen   (compare   Nelsen  ). Compare also   Neilson   and   Nielson  .

History: The Nelson name was an important one in 18th-century VA, starting with Thomas ‘Scotch Tom’ Nelson, who emigrated to VA at the close of the 17th century from Penrith, Cumbria, where the Nelsons were numerous. Scotch Tom settled c. 1700 at Yorktown, VA, where he became a successful merchant and landholder. His son was sheriff and a member of the VA Council, and his grandson, Thomas Nelson (1738–89), a signer of the Declaration of Independence, was governor of VA.

variants.name: Nell
meanings: Dutch and German: from the personal name Nel, a shortened form of Cornelius .
South German: nickname from Middle High German nelle ‘crown of the head’, perhaps denoting an obstinate person.

English: from the Middle English personal name Nelle. This may sometimes have been a variant of Nele (Nigellus, see Neal ), but it was probably more often a pet form of the commoner name Elias (see Ellis ) with a prosthetic N-.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Nelson was born on 22 May 1146, in Dalton, Lancashire, England, her father, Mr A Nelson, was 26 and her mother, Mrs Mis Nelson, was 26. She married Richard FitzRobert de Lathom before 1187, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 April 1201, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Nelson est née le 22 mai 1146, à Dalton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Mr A Nelson, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs Mis Nelson, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard FitzRobert de Lathom avant 1187, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1201, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Nelson am 22. Mai 1146 in Dalton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mr A Nelson 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs Mis Nelson 26. Sie hat vor 1187 in England Richard FitzRobert de Lathom geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. April 1201 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Lancaster, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Nelson è nata il il 22 maggio 1146 nel Dalton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Mr A Nelson, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mrs Mis Nelson, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Richard FitzRobert de Lathom prima del 1187, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 aprile 1201, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Lancaster, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Nelsonが1146年5月22日にイギリスランカシュアイアダルトンで生まれた時，父Mr A Nelsonは26歳，母Mrs Mis Nelsonは26歳であった。1187年以前にイギリスでRichard FitzRobert de Lathomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1201年4月23日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで54歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Nelson(이)가 1146년 5월 22일 영국 랭카실르 돌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mr A Nelson(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Mis Nelson(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1187년 이전 영국에서 Richard FitzRobert de Lathom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1201년 4월 23일 영국 요르크실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

mn.22 May 1146–23 April 1201: 1146 оны Тавдугаар сарын 22–1201 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 23

pt.22 May 1146–23 April 1201: 22 de maio de 1146–23 de abril de 1201
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Nelson nasceu em 22 de maio de 1146, em Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Mr A Nelson, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Mis Nelson, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard FitzRobert de Lathom antes 1187, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1201, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Nelson родилась 22 мая 1146 г. в местности далтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Mr A Nelson было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Mis Nelson, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard FitzRobert de Lathom перед 1187 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 апреля 1201 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.22 May 1146–23 April 1201: 22 de mayo de 1146–23 de abril de 1201
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Nelson nació el 22 de mayo de 1146, en Dalton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Mr A Nelson, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs Mis Nelson, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Richard FitzRobert de Lathom antes de 1187, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de abril de 1201, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
